data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified on main: (1) checkRegistryConsistency marks mismatches fixable:true with sync fix option, (2) updateRegisteredRepoMemoryManagerType in registry.ts correctly updates registry entries, (3) applyFix handles registry-consistency case with type validation and error handling, (4) all relevant commits tagged. Dirty working tree has unrelated cosmetic changes from subsequent work - does not affect shipped feature.
